name: Successor Soul
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>受</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>う</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>け<ruby lang="jp"><rb>継</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ぎし<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魂</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たましい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Tribute 1 Effect Monster, then target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; send it to the GY, then Special Summon 1 Level 7 or higher Normal Monster from your hand or Deck. You can only activate 1 "Successor Soul" per turn. You can only attack with 1 monster during the turn you activate this card.
eff: Tribute 1 Effect Monster, then target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; send it to the GY, then Special Summon 1 Level 7 or higher Normal Monster from your hand or Deck. You can only activate 1 "Successor Soul" per turn. You can only attack with 1 monster during the turn you activate this card.

action: Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
misc: Requires control of specific Monster type
